documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Overview of all processed documents (auto-refresh every 10 seconds)
documents.dropFilesHere: Drop files here or click to upload
documents.processingHistoryDescription: Complete history of all processed documents from the database
documents.noDocumentsDescription: Drop PDFs in the /consume folder to get started.
documents.deleteConfirmMessage: Do you really want to delete {count} document(s) from the database? This action cannot be undone.

ocrTab.noOCR: No Document AI OCR processing (skipped or Tesseract used)

analyze.title: AI Analyze Configuration
analyze.description: Configure how the AI analyzes documents and extracts metadata

paperlessIntegration.title: Paperless Integration
paperlessIntegration.description: Select the tags and fields used for processing
paperlessIntegration.tagAiTodoDescription: Documents with this tag will be analyzed by the AI
paperlessIntegration.tagActionRequiredDescription: Documents with detected actions receive this tag
paperlessIntegration.fieldDueDateHelp: Date by when the action must be completed

customFieldManagement.title: Custom Field Management
customFieldManagement.description: Create new custom fields in Paperless

customFieldsDisplay.title: Custom Fields in Paperless
customFieldsDisplay.description: These fields can be populated by the AI
customFieldsDisplay.noFields: No custom fields found. Create some above.

jsonStructure.title: Expected JSON Structure
jsonStructure.description: This structure is automatically generated and sent to the AI

aiBehavior.title: AI Behavior
aiBehavior.description: Configure how strict the AI should adhere to existing values
aiBehavior.tagModeFlexible: Flexible - Prefer existing, create new when sensible

tagModeDescription.strict: AI may only choose from existing tags
tagModeDescription.flexible: AI prefers existing tags, creates new ones only when necessary
tagModeDescription.free: AI creates any tags based on document content

aiBehavior.maxTagsDescription: The AI may assign at most this many tags per document
aiBehavior.strictCorrespondentsDescription: AI may only choose from existing correspondents
aiBehavior.strictDocumentTypesDescription: AI may only choose from existing document types
aiBehavior.strictStoragePathsDescription: AI may only choose from existing storage paths
aiBehavior.customPromptDescription: Add specific instructions for fine-tuning. Basic rules are automatically generated.
aiBehavior.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g.: Pay special attention to invoice numbers and due dates...

promptPreview.title: Full Prompt (Preview)
promptPreview.description: This is the complete prompt sent to the AI (automatically generated). Lists are only added when the corresponding strict modes are active.

setupWizard.title: Setup Wizard
setupWizard.description: Re-run the setup wizard to change your configuration.
setupWizard.resetDescription: This resets the setup configuration and redirects you to the setup wizard. Your existing settings will be preserved and pre-filled in the wizard.

darkMode.title: Design
darkMode.description: Choose between light and dark design
darkMode.label: Dark Mode

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.pollingVsWebhooksDescription: Webhooks are the preferred method for real-time notifications. Polling should only be enabled as a fallback when webhooks are not available.
diagnostics.deduplicationDescription: The system uses SHA-256 hashing to detect duplicates. Already processed files are automatically rejected.
diagnostics.costOptimizationDescription: Document AI and Gemini are only called for new, unique documents. Large files (over limit) are automatically skipped and use Tesseract OCR.

logs.title: Logs & Troubleshooting
logs.description: Access to system logs and debugging information
logs.dockerLogsDescription: Logs can be viewed via the Docker console:
logs.shellAccessDescription: For shell access to the container:

setup.setupCompleteDescription: Your pAIperless instance is now configured and ready to use.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.validationError: Validation error. Please check your inputs.
